[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101010 4
3 0010000 1
4 1011110 5
5 0011001 3
6 0110111 5
7 1111101 6

01 10 1111010 5
12 21 1011110 5 match 4
23 32 1011111 6
34 43 0111111 6
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1111101 6 match 7
67 76 1101000 3
70 07 1101010 4 match 2

02 20 1111110 6
13 31 0011001 3 match 5
24 42 1111111 a
35 53 1111101 6 match 7
46 64 1110111 6
57 75 1111101 6 match 7
60 06 1101010 4 match 2
71 17 1111000 4

03 30 1111011 6
14 41 0110111 5 match 6
25 52 1111111 a
36 63 1111001 5
47 74 1111111 a
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 1110000 3
72 27 1111110 6

04 40 1111111 a
15 51 1111101 6 match 7
26 62 1111110 6
37 73 1111001 5
